hero.subtitle: Frontend Engineer
hero.bio1: Frontend engineer with <mark>3+ years</mark> building products that feel as good as they look. I've worked closely with design teams in fintech and software factories — from greenfield builds to evolving complex admin systems.
hero.bio2: I care about <mark>solid foundations</mark>, reusable components, and interfaces where every detail is intentional. If it ships, it should work — and it should feel right.
